segments.text: Excellencies, colleagues, and friends, there is no doubt that we live in a world in fire.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: Wars multiplying, climate shocks accelerating, human rights are under strain, and most of all, trust in our institutions is fading.
segments.speaker: SPEAKER_10

segments.text: There are vast problems, but I think we all know that the answer cannot be a collection of band-aids.

segments.text: It cannot be just another report or another committee or another slogan.

segments.text: The crisis that the UN faces today requires something bolder than a chief administrator.

segments.text: A vision where development is not measured by speeches or slogans, but by whether people have jobs, food, education, dignity.
